essentials.label: Essentials
essentials.description: Scan hardware, estimate time, VRAM warnings.

localStudio.label: Local GPU studio
localStudio.description: Full local render pipeline with auto-optimize and progress.

maxQuality.label: Max quality
maxQuality.description: Push resolution, preset, motion, and I2V to tier limits.

functions.label: Scan GPU & RAM
functions.description: Detect VRAM, GPU model, CPU cores, and RAM before each GPU step.

functions.label: Auto-optimize build
functions.description: Set steps, frames, resolution, and motion to your tier maximum.

functions.label: Local GPU render
functions.description: Switch Director to local Python pipeline when a folder is configured.

functions.label: Max resolution boost
functions.description: Use the highest resolution tier your VRAM allows.

functions.label: Premium quality preset
functions.description: Apply PREMIUM preset capped to your hardware tier.

functions.label: Motion FX boost
functions.description: Raise motion score to tier max for dynamic camera and movement.

functions.label: GPU image-to-video
functions.description: Enable I2V when a reference image is loaded for GPU-conditioned renders.

functions.label: VRAM guard
functions.description: Warn or block builds when load exceeds safe VRAM limits.

functions.label: Build time estimate
functions.description: Show estimated render duration in the load panel.

functions.label: Render progress & cancel
functions.description: Progress bar, countdown, and cancel while building.

functions.label: Seed variations
functions.description: Queue extra seed variants on local GPU (2–4 clips per build).

functions.label: Auto graphics API
functions.description: Pick DirectX, Vulkan, Metal, or CUDA/DirectML compute stack for your GPU.
